Question ID: 2787 - DORA 011

Regulation Reference: Regulation (EU) No 2022/2554 - Digital Operational Resilience

Article: 30

Topic: ICT services

Status: Final

Date of submission: 06 Dec 2024

Question

Does subcontracting of ICT services require notification?

EIOPA answer

It depends on the contractual arrangement.

  • Point one applies.
